GRPC_HOST.help: Full upstream value used by grpc_pass (for example grpc://app:50051 or grpcs://app:443).
GRPC_HOST.label: gRPC host

GRPC_URL.help: Location URL that will be proxied to a gRPC upstream.
GRPC_URL.label: gRPC URL

GRPC_CUSTOM_HOST.help: Override Host header sent to gRPC upstream.
GRPC_CUSTOM_HOST.label: gRPC custom host

GRPC_HEADERS.help: List of headers to send to gRPC upstream separated with semicolons (values for grpc_set_header directive).
GRPC_HEADERS.label: gRPC headers

GRPC_HIDE_HEADERS.help: List of headers to hide from clients when received from gRPC upstream (values for grpc_hide_header directive).
GRPC_HIDE_HEADERS.label: gRPC hide headers

GRPC_INTERCEPT_ERRORS.help: Intercept and rewrite gRPC upstream errors.
GRPC_INTERCEPT_ERRORS.label: Intercept errors

GRPC_CONNECT_TIMEOUT.help: Timeout when connecting to the gRPC upstream.
GRPC_CONNECT_TIMEOUT.label: gRPC connect timeout

GRPC_READ_TIMEOUT.help: Timeout when reading from the gRPC upstream.
GRPC_READ_TIMEOUT.label: gRPC read timeout

GRPC_SEND_TIMEOUT.help: Timeout when sending to the gRPC upstream.
GRPC_SEND_TIMEOUT.label: gRPC send timeout

GRPC_SOCKET_KEEPALIVE.help: Enable or disable keepalive for gRPC upstream sockets.
GRPC_SOCKET_KEEPALIVE.label: gRPC socket keepalive

GRPC_SSL_SNI.help: Enable or disable sending SNI to gRPC upstream server.
GRPC_SSL_SNI.label: SSL SNI

GRPC_SSL_SNI_NAME.help: Sets the SNI host to send to gRPC upstream server.
GRPC_SSL_SNI_NAME.label: SSL SNI name

GRPC_NEXT_UPSTREAM.help: Conditions for selecting the next gRPC upstream server.
GRPC_NEXT_UPSTREAM.label: gRPC next upstream

GRPC_NEXT_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT.help: Time limit for passing a request to the next gRPC upstream server.
GRPC_NEXT_UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT.label: gRPC next upstream timeout

GRPC_NEXT_UPSTREAM_TRIES.help: Maximum number of attempts for passing a request to the next gRPC upstream server.
GRPC_NEXT_UPSTREAM_TRIES.label: gRPC next upstream tries

GRPC_INCLUDES.help: Additional configuration to include in the gRPC location block, separated with spaces.
GRPC_INCLUDES.label: gRPC includes
